articles.title: Gerry McQuade
articles.contents:
Gerald McQuade
          
          
          Home
          About
          Blog
          
          
          
          ☰
          
          
      
        
          
            
              
            
              Gerry McQuade
            
            
              
                
                    
                      
                        
                    
                  
                                    
                    
                      
                        
                    
                  
                                    
                    
                      
                        
                    
                  
                                    
                    
                      
                        
                    
                  
                                    
                    
                      
                        LU profile
                      
                    
                  
                                  
            
          
        
        
        
          
            
            About me
            PhD candidate in economics at Lancaster
            University Management School. My research interests are
            in early childhood development and skill formation, the
            socio-economic impacts of climate and environmental shocks,
            and the interaction between these two processes in low and
            middle income contexts.
            I will be a visiting student at ODID, University of
            Oxford, during trinity term 2023.
            Long suffering Scottish rugby fan.
            
            
            Education
            Lancaster University | Lancaster, UK
            PhD Economics | 2020 -
            University of Edinburgh | Edinburgh,
            UK
            MSc Economics (Scottish Graduate Program in Economics) |
            2019 - 2020
            Heriot Watt University | Edinburgh,
            UK
            MA Economics | 2015 - 2019
            
            
            Experience
            Research assistant to Simon Franklin |
            April 2022 - Present
            Young Lives | Research Consultant |
            March 2021 - September 2021
            Young Lives | Research Assistant | June
            2020 - September 2020
            Office for National Statistics |
            Statistical Officer | May 2019 - September 2019
            Health Economics Research Unit, University of
            Aberdeen | Research Intern | June 2018 - August
            2018
            
          
        
      
    

    
      
        
          
            
              
            
              Gerry McQuade
